languages.text: "Ничего необычного, Лорд-капитан. Это праздничное шествие в честь ваших заслуг — порой проповедники и офицеры флагмана устраивают подобные церемонии, чтобы поддерживать в рабочих чувство благодарности к кормящей их руке. Занимательно, что в этот раз процессия организована не офицерами".

traits.locale_text: "Ничего необычного, Лорд-капитан. Это праздничное шествие в честь ваших заслуг — порой проповедники и офицеры флагмана устраивают подобные церемонии, чтобы поддерживать в рабочих чувство благодарности к кормящей их руке. Занимательно, что в этот раз процессия организована не офицерами".

languages.text: "Nothing out of the ordinary, Lord Captain. Just a celebratory procession in recognition of your deeds. The flagship's preachers and officers occasionally hold these ceremonies to foster gratitude within the crew toward the hand that feeds them. Remarkably, the procession was not organised by the officers this time."
languages.original_text: "Ничего необычного, Лорд-капитан. Занимательно, что в этот раз процессия организована не офицерами".

languages.text: "Nichts Außergewöhnliches, Lord Captain. Nur eine Kundgebung in Anerkennung Eurer Taten. Die Priester und Offiziere des Flaggschiffes halten derartige Zeremonien gelegentlich ab, um die Dankbarkeit der Crew gegenüber der Hand zu stärken, die sie füttert. Erstaunlicherweise wurde die Prozession in diesem Fall nicht von den Offizieren organisiert."
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary, Lord Captain. Just a celebratory procession in recognition of your deeds. The flagship's preachers and officers occasionally hold these ceremonies to foster gratitude within the crew toward the hand that feeds them. Remarkably, the procession was not organised by the officers this time."

traits.locale_text: "Nichts Außergewöhnliches, Lord Captain. Nur eine Kundgebung in Anerkennung Eurer Taten. Die Priester und Offiziere des Flaggschiffes halten derartige Zeremonien gelegentlich ab, um die Dankbarkeit der Crew gegenüber der Hand zu stärken, die sie füttert. Erstaunlicherweise wurde die Prozession in diesem Fall nicht von den Offizieren organisiert."

languages.text: « Rien d'extraordinaire, {mf|seigneur-captaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Une simple procession en reconnaissance de vos actes. Les prédicateurs et les officiers du vaisseau organisent ces cérémonies de temps à autre pour inciter l'équipage à faire preuve de gratitude envers la main qui les nourrit. Il est néanmoins notable que cette fois, ce ne sont pas les officiers qui en sont à l'origine. »
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary, Lord Captain. Just a celebratory procession in recognition of your deeds. The flagship's preachers and officers occasionally hold these ceremonies to foster gratitude within the crew toward the hand that feeds them. Remarkably, the procession was not organised by the officers this time."

traits.locale_text: « Rien d'extraordinaire, {mf|seigneur-captaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Une simple procession en reconnaissance de vos actes. Les prédicateurs et les officiers du vaisseau organisent ces cérémonies de temps à autre pour inciter l'équipage à faire preuve de gratitude envers la main qui les nourrit. Il est néanmoins notable que cette fois, ce ne sont pas les officiers qui en sont à l'origine. »

languages.text: “没什么稀奇的，舰长大人，不过是庆祝您善举的游行而已。旗舰上的布道士和军官偶尔会搞搞这类仪式，让船员们对他们的恩主心怀感激。不过这一次的游行并不是军官们组织的。”
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary, Lord Captain. Just a celebratory procession in recognition of your deeds. The flagship's preachers and officers occasionally hold these ceremonies to foster gratitude within the crew toward the hand that feeds them. Remarkably, the procession was not organised by the officers this time."

traits.locale_text: “没什么稀奇的，舰长大人，不过是庆祝您善举的游行而已。旗舰上的布道士和军官偶尔会搞搞这类仪式，让船员们对他们的恩主心怀感激。不过这一次的游行并不是军官们组织的。”

languages.text: «No es nada especial, Lord Capitán. Se trata de una simple procesión que celebra sus hazañas. Los predicadores y oficiales de la nave insignia celebran ceremonias como esta para fomentar el agradecimiento de la tripulación hacia la mano que les da de comer. Sí es notable el hecho de que esta vez la procesión no la han organizado los oficiales».
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary, Lord Captain. Just a celebratory procession in recognition of your deeds. The flagship's preachers and officers occasionally hold these ceremonies to foster gratitude within the crew toward the hand that feeds them. Remarkably, the procession was not organised by the officers this time."

traits.locale_text: «No es nada especial, Lord Capitán. Se trata de una simple procesión que celebra sus hazañas. Los predicadores y oficiales de la nave insignia celebran ceremonias como esta para fomentar el agradecimiento de la tripulación hacia la mano que les da de comer. Sí es notable el hecho de que esta vez la procesión no la han organizado los oficiales».

languages.text: 「いつもと変わりはありません。あなたの奉仕を称えるお祭りの行列です。時々、説教師や旗艦の役員たちが、自分たちを養ってくれる手への感謝の気持ちを労働者たちに持たせるために行うんです。興味深いのは、今回の行列が将校たちによって組織されたものではないということです」。
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary Lord Captain. It's a festive procession in honour of your services — sometimes preachers and officers of the flagship hold them to keep the workers feeling grateful to the hand that feeds them. What is interesting is that this time the procession is not organised by the officers."

languages.text: "Sıra dışı bir şey yok Lord Kaptan. Sadece eylemlerinizi onurlandırmak için kutlama amaçlı bir tören yürüyüşü. Sancak gemisinin vaizleri ve subayları, mürettebat içinde kendilerini besleyen ele karşı minnettarlığı teşvik etmek için zaman zaman bu tür törenler düzenler. İlginç olan şu ki alay, bu sefer subaylar tarafından organize edilmemiş."
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary, Lord Captain. Just a celebratory procession in recognition of your deeds. The flagship's preachers and officers occasionally hold these ceremonies to foster gratitude within the crew toward the hand that feeds them. Remarkably, the procession was not organised by the officers this time."

Sancak gemisinin vaizleri ve subayları, mürettebat içinde kendilerini besleyen ele karşı minnettarlığı teşvik etmek için zaman zaman bu tür törenler düzenler. İlginç olan şu ki alay, bu sefer subaylar tarafından organize edilmemiş."
